title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.1095 - Rules and regulations, promulgation
text:
376.1095.  Rules and regulations, promulgation. — The director shall have the power to promulgate such rules and regulations as are necessary to implement the provisions of sections 376.1075 to 376.1095.  No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 376.1075 to 376.1095 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1993 H.B. 709 § 54, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
